figure_not_found: ❌ Character ID {id} not found or deceased
figure_summary_line: {status}{tier} ID:{id:<3} {name:<25} Faction:{faction:<12} Influence:{influence} Wealth:{wealth} Popularity:{popularity} Land:{land} Veterans:{veterans} Office:{office}
province_summary_header_line: ID    Name         Type        Governor            Unrest   Tax Contract        Project Contract     Controller
province_detail_designate: Governor Designate: {name} (takes effect in Resolution phase)
province_invalid_id: ❌ Invalid province ID: {input}, must be an integer
phase_mortality_preview:
--- Phase Preview (AI default decisions) ---
The Mortality phase is the core beginning of each turn, triggering random events such as "Death Comes", "A Mighty Man Descends", and "Bountiful Harvest" that directly affect character survival and national fortune. You must honor the gods and care for the people to turn misfortune into good fortune and keep the Republic peaceful.
phase_revenue_preview:
--- Phase Preview ---
The Revenue phase is the economic core of the turn, settling state land income, faction treasury income, private land income of nobles, and contractor profits. Simultaneously, legion / fleet maintenance and provincial operating expenses are deducted. Wealth is the lifeblood of the state, and land is Rome's eternal pursuit.
phase_forum_preview:
--- Phase Preview ---
The Forum phase is the core interactive part of the game, featuring three major mechanics: character recruitment, contract auctions, and land transactions. You can bid to recruit characters, compete for engineering/fleet contracts, and facilitate land trades. Results directly affect your faction's strength, personal wealth, and subsequent Senate agendas and interest distributions. Use your resources wisely to gain maximum advantage!
phase_population_preview:
--- Phase Preview ---
Decide Rome's future leaders! Factions hold festivals for candidates and canvass for votes. Your influence turns into ballots. Who will be consul? Who will control the Senate? Every decision reshapes the balance of power. Winners gain glory, losers must wait for next year. Your influence is Rome's strength. Act now and let your faction stand at the pinnacle of power!
phase_senate_preview:
--- Phase Preview ---
The heart of Rome beats here! This is the true seat of Roman power: declarations of war and peace, appointments of governors, approval of budgets—every decision requires a Senate vote. Your influence is your weapon; factional maneuvering peaks here. Choose expansion through war or peaceful development? Support allies or weaken opponents? Every vote can change the course of history. Use your influence to write Rome's destiny!
phase_combat_preview:
--- Phase Preview ---
Victory or defeat lies in your hands! Assign legions, choose commanders, and decide the outcome on the battlefield. Great victories bring rich spoils and glory; stalemates test your strategic patience; defeat can ruin years of effort. Here, courage and wisdom are indispensable. Lead your legions to expand Rome's borders or negotiate a dignified peace at the negotiating table!
phase_resolution_preview:
--- Phase Preview ---
Rome's annual examination! Is the treasury in surplus or deficit? Has unrest spiraled out of control? Can provincial rebellions be suppressed? All accumulated decisions are revealed now. Consecutive deficits will lead to the Republic's collapse, while rampant unrest may trigger widespread rebellion. But if you navigate these dangers, your faction may approach a dictatorship victory. Every step is treacherous. Review your governance and prepare for the challenges of the next year!
cmd_step_desc: Execute the next phase step by step
cmd_next_desc: Advance to the next turn (requires all phases completed)
error_phase_not_complete: Not all phases completed this turn. Execute all phases first.
error_phase_already_done: All phases already executed this turn. Use 'next' to advance to the next turn.
info_turn_complete: All phases already executed this turn.
exit_message: Thank you for playing Eagle of Rome! Goodbye!
help_prompt: Type 'help' to see available commands, 'exit' to quit the game
error_not_your_turn: ❌ It is not your turn. Please wait for other players.
error_figure_not_in_your_faction: ❌ This character does not belong to your faction
error_figure_has_active_contract: ❌ This character has an active contract and cannot be retired
error_figure_not_in_curia: ❌ This character is not in the Forum
error_invalid_amount: ❌ Amount must be a positive integer
error_contract_not_auctionable: ❌ This contract cannot be bid on
info_figure_retired: ✅ {name} has been retired and is now in the Forum
step_retirement_description:
--- Step Description ---
Fresh blood is vital to keep your organization dynamic. Removing members who contribute little frees up room to recruit better talents. Choose members from your list to retire, letting them seek their fortune in the Forum.
step_market_description:
--- Step Description ---
The Roman Forum teems with hidden talents and material desires. Here you can use the power of money to expand your influence: recruit talents, bid for contracts, acquire land, and befriend the powerful. All competition is fair under Roman law. Now place your bets!
step_trade_description:
--- Step Description ---
Nobles have land, knights have money. Land is a symbol of status, money is the guarantee of power. No place suits Rome's backroom deals better than the land market. All land transactions must be registered with the government, making them accountable anti-corruption weapons!
prompt_retirement_actions:
🔧 Actions available ({player}):
   1. investigate → View character details
   2. retire → Retire a faction member
   3. next/n → Next player
prompt_market_actions:
🔧 Actions available ({player}):
   1. investigate → View character details
   2. recruit → Recruit a character
   3. bid → Bid on a contract
   4. buy → Purchase public land
   5. vote → Vote on a triumph
   6. balance → Check faction treasury
   7. next → Next player
prompt_trade_actions:
🔧 Actions available ({player}):
   1. transact → Trade land
   2. next → Next phase
info_skip_quaestor_phase: ⚠️ There is no quaestor in Rome, skipping this phase.

error_no_vacancies: ⚠️ Faction {faction} has no vacancies, cannot recruit further.
info_campaign_success: {name} spent {amount} to hold a festival, popularity +{amount}!
error_invalid_profit_rate: Profit rate must be between 0 and 1
error_bid_mismatch: {type} contract bid must equal {base} * (1{sign}{rate}) = {expected}, current bid {actual}
error_figure_not_candidate: This character is not a valid candidate for this office
error_faction_full: Faction is full, cannot recruit new members.
error_not_knight: Only knights can participate in contract bidding.
error_not_triumph_war: This war is not eligible for a triumph.
error_no_land_sale_quota: No public land available for sale this turn
